title: The Straw Hats Are Cornered
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the straw hats are cornered, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Straw Hats Are Cornered. The trapped crew survives Crocodile’s death trap and scrambles to continue the mission before the war reaches Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Yuba will never be defeated by mere sand...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It WAS YOU...?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: It's me! Can't you recognize me!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Well, I guess I can't blame you since I lost a few.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You'll pay for this...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Haha Haha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Oh crap! The room's starting to flood!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This entire room's gonna be flooded at this rate!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: viv!! You have to do some- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm too young to die in an hour!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Calm down, will ya...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me!? This is a textbook example of when to panic!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: We're going to die at this rate! D-I-E! Do you understand what that means!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Choose between my country... or my friends...? You don't actually intend on letting me choose, do you!? Even if I left right now, I know you'll kill me before I ever reached alubarna!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Clutch

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I know that nothing will change until you're dead...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: twirl...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How dare you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How dare you do this to Alabasta,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: When you don't even know the slightest thing about its people or history...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: You can't give up!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: You have to get us out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kuhaha! Have you started to beg for your life, Straw- Hat Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's to be expected, of course. Anyone would be afraid to die...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If we die here,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then who the hell's gonna give him the beating his ass needs!?

summary: This part develops the straw hats are cornered and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
